name: haroom_plugins
description: haroom Claude Code plugins - ddaro, prism, triad, mangchi

plugins.name: ddaro
plugins.description: Worktree-based parallel workflow - isolated branch work, deletion-aware commits, size-based merge review, crash-recoverable context.

plugins.name: prism
plugins.description: Multi-angle code review - 5 parallel agents discover, singleton verifier cross-checks. Agreement auto-confirms.

plugins.name: triad
plugins.description: 3-perspective deliberation on one document or code file - LLM clarity / architectural longevity / end-user comprehension - parallel subagents until consensus.

plugins.name: mangchi
plugins.description: Iterative cross-model code refinement - Claude patches, Codex CLI reviews one axis per round with verification loop, until the code converges.
